longFormRunPolicy.rule: Each active long-form run may consider three exploratory model structures and must collapse them into one final fourth structure before the current run window ends.

timeDilationPolicy.rule: If the active long-form task map completes earlier than its expected review windows, the agentic working group may pull work only from the next declared task map and not beyond it.

tasks.label: Release Candidate Cycle
tasks.purpose: Run the governed release-candidate conveyor and publish the latest candidate evidence bundle.
tasks.completionSignal: Latest release-candidate bundle contains a build-evidence manifest.
escalatesWhen: release-candidate run cannot emit a valid evidence bundle

tasks.label: Daily HITL Digest
tasks.purpose: Emit the daily review surface that tells us whether the build can continue unattended or now owes human review.
tasks.completionSignal: Latest digest bundle contains release-candidate-digest.json and release-candidate-digest.md.

tasks.label: Promotion Watch
tasks.authority: Automation may classify; HITL decides promotion
tasks.purpose: Track whether the current automation posture is clear to continue, requires HITL, or is blocked.
tasks.completionSignal: Current posture is reflected in local-automation-tasking-status.json.

tasks.label: Scheduler Watch
tasks.trigger: scheduled task registration and next-run clock
tasks.purpose: Track whether the local Windows scheduler is registered, ready, and aligned to the next release-candidate cadence.
tasks.completionSignal: Scheduled task is registered and exposes a next run time.
outputs: Windows Scheduled Task: OAN Mortalis Governed Automation Cycle
escalatesWhen: scheduled task has no next run time

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 01
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Make the current local automation cycle report transitions, first scheduled execution truth, and status freshness without requiring manual probing.

tasks.label: Notification Surface
tasks.purpose: Emit a bounded local notification or inbox surface when posture changes from clear-to-continue to hitl-required or blocked.
tasks.completionSignal: A posture transition produces a stable local notification artifact without widening publication authority.
escalatesWhen: notification cannot distinguish hitl-required from blocked

tasks.label: First Scheduled Run Capture
tasks.purpose: Capture and report the first scheduler-driven execution so the machine proves it can move without manual invocation.
tasks.completionSignal: Task board records a real scheduler last-run time and links it to the latest release-candidate bundle.
escalatesWhen: scheduled execution fails to produce a bundle

tasks.label: Status Freshness Reconciliation
tasks.purpose: Keep cycle state, digest state, task board state, and scheduler state in agreement after unattended runs.
tasks.completionSignal: The task board can prove which live artifact is newest and whether any status surface is stale.
escalatesWhen: task board timestamps drift from cycle or digest truth
scheduler next-run and cycle next-run disagree materially

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 02
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Deepen unattended evidence quality without crossing into ungated promotion authority.

tasks.label: Delta Summary Surface
tasks.purpose: Summarize what changed between the latest release-candidate bundle and the previous one.
tasks.completionSignal: Latest digest includes a bounded delta summary without inferring maturity.
escalatesWhen: delta logic starts inferring authority or promotion

tasks.label: Artifact Retention Pruning
tasks.purpose: Prune or compact old local evidence bundles according to declared retention policy while preserving review truth.
tasks.completionSignal: Retention policy can delete or compact stale local bundles without harming active review surfaces.
escalatesWhen: pruning would delete the current active review surface

tasks.label: Blocked Escalation Bundle
tasks.purpose: Prepare a bounded escalation bundle when the automation posture becomes blocked.
tasks.completionSignal: A blocked posture produces one stable bundle that points to the exact failing evidence surfaces.
escalatesWhen: escalation bundle widens into autonomous remediation
